title: Pregnancy with a prior cesarean scar: risks and monitoring
excerpt: Prior uterine or abdominal surgery needs close follow-up for placenta accreta and scar-related complications.
content:
## Context

Many people safely conceive after cesarean or abdominal surgery but belong to a **high-monitoring** group.

## Risks to discuss

- Placenta accreta spectrum.
- Placenta previa.
- Uterine rupture (rare but serious).

## Recommended steps

- Antenatal care at an experienced obstetric center.
- Ultrasound to assess placenta and scar as indicated.
- Discuss **VBAC vs repeat cesarean** — not one-size-fits-all.

## Emergency signs

Sudden severe abdominal pain, heavy bleeding, abnormal fetal heart rate — go to hospital immediately.
